title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: November 21, 2024
summary: November 21, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to increase this week but at a lower rate of 5.34% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 6.95%), from the level on 11/14/2024 of 9.068 M km 2 to 9.580 M km 2 for this week.
